summary: Clear UltraMatrix recording of a great show with a memorable "Just a Little Light" moment
review: The UltraMatrix source captures the performance with crystal‑clear clarity, even preserving a funny crowd outburst just before the "Just a Little Light" moment. Reviewers describe the concert as a great show overall, though no specific songs are highlighted beyond that brief reference.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4 ★) praises both sound quality and the concert, leading to a solid rating but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes "clear as day" sound; crowd noise is present but adds character rather than detracting from clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewer simply calls the show "great".
